item.title: Texas Coach Vic Schaefer Rips Team After Vanderbilt Loss: 'We Have No Heart'
item.description: Texas coach Vic Schaefer called the Longhorns "soft" after they lost to Vanderbilt on their home floor, 86-70.

item.title: 'Football Is Freedom': Bob Marley Inspires Jamaica's Kits Ahead of World Cup
item.description: Jamaica's newest football kits celebrate both Bob Marley's life and the rich musical tradition of the island nation.

item.title: Justin Verlander on Tigers' Reunion: 'I Thought There Was a Chance I Come Back'
item.description: Now back with the Detroit Tigers, Justin Verlander discussed on Thursday how he felt a reunion was always possible.

item.title: Phillies Manager Rob Thomson 'Proud' Nick Castellanos Admitted Beer Incident
item.description: Phillies manager Rob Thomson said he was "proud" of the recently released Nick Castellanos for owning his dugout beer incident.

item.title: Travis Kelce Playing, Taylor Swift Rumors Spike Pebble Beach Ticket Sales $60K
item.description: Travis Kelce is playing in the Pebble Beach Pro-am, and there was a spike on ticket sales amid rumors his fiancÃ© Taylor Swift would attend.
